session_participant_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual session_participant_config_t(3)

NAME

session_participant_config_t - Configuration for session participant.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/common/session/participant.h>

Data Fields


const char * address
Server address to connect to. int port
Server port (default: 27224). bool encryption_enabled
Enable encryption (default: true). const char * password
Password for server authentication (optional). const char * server_key
Expected server key for verification (optional). bool enable_audio
Enable audio streaming. bool enable_video
Enable video capture and streaming. session_participant_callbacks_t callbacks
Event callbacks. void * user_data
User-provided context pointer passed to callbacks.

Detailed Description

Configuration for session participant.
